exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your podcast creation forward
items: What unique perspective, expertise, or story do I bring that would make people want to listen to my voice specifically, rather than consuming this content through another medium or creator?
Who is my ideal listener, and what specific problem, curiosity, or emotional need does my podcast solve for them that they can\

What format and episode structure will best serve my content goals and audience needs - and do I have the realistic time, energy, and resources to maintain this format consistently over the long term?
What existing knowledge gaps do I need to fill about podcasting fundamentals - from technical recording basics to content strategy principles - before I start creating, and what\

What are the core values and principles that will guide my podcast content decisions, and how will I maintain consistency with these values even when facing pressure to chase trends or controversial topics for downloads?

What foundational understanding do I have of my chosen podcast niche or topic area, and where might my knowledge limitations create credibility risks or missed opportunities to provide genuine value to listeners?
